sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_test (ip_string String, ip_num UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ip_string;
SELECT ip_string, isIPv4String(ip_string) AS is_ipv4 FROM ip_test WHERE isIPv4String(ip_string) = 1;
SELECT ip_string FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ip_string FROM ip_test WHERE isIPv4String(ip_string) BETWEEN 0 AND 1) AS temp WHERE ip_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ip_num, COUNT(*) FROM ip_test GROUP BY ip_num HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT ip_string, isIPv4String(ip_string) FROM ip_test WHERE ip_string BETWEEN '0.0.0.0' AND '255.255.255.255' AND ip_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ip_string FROM ip_test WHERE ip_string IS NOT NULL AND isIPv4String(ip_string) = 1 ORDER BY ip_string;
CREATE TABLE temp_store AS SELECT ip_string, isIPv4String(ip_string) AS is_ipv4 FROM ip_test WHERE ip_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ip_string FROM temp_store WHERE (ip_string IS NOT NULL AND is_ipv4 BETWEEN 1 AND 1);
